<function=python>

# Check current block position
seg = current_frame.segmentation

for node in seg['nodes']:

# Check the area around the block

print("\n=== Block area (rows 30-45, cols 18-35) ===")
for r in range(30, 46):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_grid[r][18:35]}")

# Check for white cross
print("\n=== White cross check ===")
for r in range(29, 40):
    line = ascii_grid[r][18:28]
    if 'W' in line or 'w' in line:
        print(f"Row {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
